title: Dragon Egg Duplication
description: This mod adds a crafting duplication for the dragon egg, simple
body:
**Dragon Egg Duplication**
========
This mod adds a crafting duplication for the dragon egg.

Recipe: 

- 4 Eye of Enders
- 4 Ender Crystals
- 1 Dragon Egg

![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd4fd3818ef50e1c293807d5b4fa541f7cc3c090.png)

Crafts 2 Dragon Eggs
